hero.title: SOLORAH

oracleAmour.name: Love Oracle
oracleAmour.description: An oracle dedicated to matters of the heart. 44 cards to illuminate your love life, relationships, and deepest emotions.

tarotMarseille.name: Tarot de Marseille Remastered
tarotMarseille.description: The ancestral tarot reimagined with a contemporary aesthetic. 78 arcana to explore all areas of your life.

oracleShiva.name: Shiva Oracle
oracleShiva.description: An oracle inspired by Shiva's wisdom. 20 cards to illuminate your decisions and find your path.

step1.title: Choose your deck
step1.description: Love Oracle, Tarot de Marseille or Shiva Oracle — each deck has its unique energy.

step2.title: Draw your cards
step2.description: Focus on your question, then let your intuition guide your choice.

step3.title: Receive your message
step3.description: Discover the interpretation of your cards and the message they carry for you.

consultation.description: Want a personalized, in-depth interpretation? Ask your question to our oracle.

footer.disclaimer: Readings are offered for entertainment and personal development purposes. They are not a substitute for medical, legal, or financial advice.
